StyledText.Data: Modify Page item in <<FAT Title::Reference title>>

Calculation.Text: notDeveloper
"Change block type for page item"
notDeveloper

StyledText.Data: IOs for building block: <<FAT Block @ Page item::Name>>

Calculation.Text: "View all IOs defined in title"
isEditor Or isTranslator
FAT IO Value @ Page item::IO Array
"Unknown type"
"Select IO"
"Remove"

StyledText.Data: IO Array: <<BlockTemplate @ Page item::Label IO Array>>

Calculation.Text: IsEmpty ( BlockTemplate @ Page item::IO Type Array)
"Add an IO to the IO Array"
IsEmpty ( BlockTemplate @ Page item::IO Type Array)
IsEmpty ( BlockTemplate @ Page item::IO Type Array)
"Select a list"
BlockTemplate @ Page item::List enabled < 1
BlockTemplate @ Page item::List enabled < 1
notDeveloper
PatternCount ( FAT Modifier @ Page item::Name ; "io_" )
"Page item"
"Clear value"
"Select a stateToggle value"
ValueCount (FAT Modifier @ Page item::ValuesList) <5
ValueCount ( FAT Modifier @ Page item::ValuesList) > 4

ScriptReference.name: Create and add IO to PI

Calculation.Text: FAT Page item::PrimaryKey
"Create a new IO of right type and connect it automatically to this page item. Only for input blocks."
Not IsEmpty ( FAT Page item::IO id Legacy) Or Not IsEmpty ( FAT IO Value @ Page item::PrimaryKey ) Or Not BlockTemplate @ Page item::IO write enabled
"Select IO Group"
"Primary"
"Create a comma-separated array of IOs"
IsEmpty ( FAT Page item::IO id Legacy )
"Add IOs to array. Press delete to clear"
"/*IsEmpty ( CMT Page item::IO id array)*/"
"Select an IO for this page item"
BlockTemplate @ Page item::IO enabled <1 Or Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item::gIOGroup)

StyledText.Data: Legacy IO Type: <<FAT IO @ Page item Legacy::IO type>>

CharacterStyle.Text: Type: <<FAT IO @ Page item Legacy::IO type>>

Calculation.Text: "Add IOs to array. Press delete to clear"
IsEmpty ( FAT Page item::IO id Legacy)

StyledText.Data: IO for user input and output

<<FAT IO @ Page item Legacy::Author description>> Background color: <<FAT IO @ Page item Legacy::<Field Missing>>> Text color: <<FAT IO @ Page item Legacy::<Field Missing>>> IO Context: <<FAT IO @ Page item Legacy::<Field Missing>>>

Calculation.Text: IsEmpty ( FAT Page item::IO id Legacy )
SetProperty ( "io_id" ; FAT Page item::IO id Legacy) & SetProperty ( "call_layout" ; Get(layoutName))
"Rename IO"
IsEmpty ( FAT Page item::IO id Legacy )
"Select an IO for this page item"
BlockTemplate @ Page item::IO enabled <1 Or IsEmpty (FAT Page item::gIOGroup)
Count(IO Block Template @ Page item::PrimaryKey) > 0 Or Not IsEmpty (BlockTemplate @ Page item::IO Type Array)

StyledText.Data: IO for user input and output

Connect this page item to an IO to be able to store or retreive user input data. Select an IO from the pop-up menu that you want to connect to this page item. Some IOs can show input from multiple IOs in an array. Add IOs to an array by pressing the button "Add to IO array". Data will be stored and retreived in a format given by the IO type. Each building block manipulates the IO type in different ways. <<BlockTemplate @ Page item::Name>> - Block IO information <<BlockTemplate @ Page item::IO usage description>>

PopoverPanel.name: Input field settings popover

Title.Text: Case (BlockTemplate @ Page item::AI aspect enabled; "Which aspects do you want this insight page item to display from " & FAT IO @ IO Value @ Page item current::Name & "?"; "Field settings for IO " & FAT IO @ IO Value @ Page item current::Name )

TableOccurrenceReference.name: FAT IO Value @ Page item Current

Calculation.Text: "Select an input field to sort inputs"

ValueListReference.name: IO Fields in IO using Page item List

Calculation.Text: Not BlockTemplate @ Page item::IO Field List Sync
//not FAT IO Value @ Page item::IO Array
"Enter value"
"enter a string or number value"
FAT IO Field @ IO Condition @ Page item::Exposed Value type = "List"
Self<0
Self>0
"Enter value"

ValueListReference.name: IO Fields List item @ PI VL

Calculation.Text: "enter a string or number value"
FAT IO Field @ IO Condition @ Page item::Exposed Value type ≠ "List"
Self<0
Self>0
FAT IO Field @ IO Condition @ Page item::Value type ≠ "Text" And FAT IO Field @ IO Condition @ Page item::Value type ≠ "Dropdown"
FAT IO Field @ IO Condition @ Page item::Exposed Value type = "Text" Or FAT IO Field @ IO Condition @ Page item::Exposed Value type = "Dropdown"

TableOccurrenceReference.name: FAT IO Field @ IO Condition @ Page item

StyledText.Data: Filter for which saved IOs to show

Calculation.Text: "Select an input field to add a condition"
SetProperty ( "type" ; "Page item" ) & SetProperty ( "parent_id" ; FAT Page item::gCurrentIOValue )

StyledText.Data: Show only input where input field

Calculation.Text: //not FAT IO Value @ Page item::IO Array
"Select sort order"

TableOccurrenceReference.name: FAT IO Field @ IO SortOrder @ Page item

Calculation.Text: "Select an input field to sort inputs"
SetProperty ( "type" ; "Page item" ) & SetProperty ( "parent_id" ; FAT Page item::gCurrentIOValue )
FATversion < 3 Or BlockTemplate @ Page item::AI aspect enabled
BlockTemplate @ Page item::AI aspect enabled

TableOccurrenceReference.name: FAT IO Field Value @ Page item
FAT IO Field @ Field Value @ Page item

Calculation.Text: //not FAT IO Value @ Page item::IO Array

StyledText.Data: <<FAT IO Field Value @ Page item::Field name>>

TableOccurrenceReference.name: FAT IO Field Value @ Page item
FAT IO Field Value @ Page item
FAT IO Field @ Field Value @ Page item

Calculation.Text: BlockTemplate @ Page item::AI aspect enabled

FieldReference.name: IO Insight Selected Aspect List items

Calculation.Text: Not BlockTemplate @ Page item::AI aspect enabled
//not FAT IO Value @ Page item::IO Array
"Unknown type"
"Select IO"
FAT IO @ Page item::IO type & ": " & FAT IO @ Page item::Author description
Not IsEmpty ( FAT Page item::gIOGroup ) Or BlockTemplate @ Page item::IO Field List Sync = 1

ScriptReference.name: Modify IO Value at Page item

Calculation.Text: FAT IO Value @ Page item::PrimaryKey

LayoutObject.name: IO in IO Group for Block

Calculation.Text: "Select IO"
FAT IO @ Page item::IO type & ": " & FAT IO @ Page item::Author description
IsEmpty ( FAT Page item::gIOGroup ) Or BlockTemplate @ Page item::IO Field List Sync = 1

ScriptReference.name: Modify IO Value at Page item

Calculation.Text: FAT IO Value @ Page item::PrimaryKey
"Select IO"
FAT IO @ Page item::IO type & ": " & FAT IO @ Page item::Author description
BlockTemplate @ Page item::IO Field List Sync = 0

ScriptReference.name: Modify IO Value at Page item

Calculation.Text: FAT IO Value @ Page item::PrimaryKey
SetProperty ( "io_id" ; FAT IO Value @ Page item::IO id) & SetProperty ( "call_layout" ; Get(layoutName)) & SetProperty ( "io_type" ; FAT IO @ Page item::IO type)
"Edit IO settings"
IsEmpty(FAT IO Value @ Page item::IO id)
"Remove"
SetProperty ( "type" ; "Page item" ) & SetProperty ( "parent_id" ; FAT IO Value @ Page item::PrimaryKey )
"Show input field settings"
FAT IO @ Page item::Number of fields = 0

StyledText.Data: <<ƒ:Case ( FAT IO Value @ Page item::IO Array; BlockTemplate @ Page item::Label IO Array & " • " & BlockTemplate @ Page item::IO Type Array; Proper (IO Block Template @ IO Value::Label) & " • " & IO Block Template @ IO Value::Function )>>

Calculation.Text: "Show input from"
FATversion < 4 Or BlockTemplate @ Page item::Insight enabled Or IsEmpty ( FAT IO Value @ Page item::IO id )
SetProperty ( "io_id" ; FAT IO Value @ Page item::IO id )
"Context"
FATversion > 3 Or BlockTemplate @ Page item::Insight enabled Or IsEmpty ( FAT IO Value @ Page item::IO id )

StyledText.Data: <<ƒ:Case ( BlockTemplate @ Page item::AI aspect enabled; "Aspect field"; FATversion <4 ; "IO Context" ; "Show input from" )>>

Calculation.Text: IsEmpty ( FAT IO Value @ Page item::IO id ) Or BlockTemplate @ Page item::AI aspect enabled Or IO Type @ IO Value::FATType = "Post" And FAT IO @ Page item::Number of fields = 0
"Write as"

FATversion < 4 Or Not BlockTemplate @ Page item::IO write enabled And IO Block Template @ IO Value::Function ≠ "Write" And Not PatternCount ( List(FAT IO Field Value @ IO Value PI::Field mode); "Write") Or IsEmpty ( FAT IO Value @ Page item::IO id ) /*FATversion < 4 or not io_write_enabled and io_template_function ≠ "Write" and not PatternCount ( field_mode_list ; "Write" ) */
SetProperty ( "io_id" ; FAT IO Value @ Page item::IO id )

FATversion < 4 Or Not BlockTemplate @ Page item::IO write enabled And IO Block Template @ IO Value::Function ≠ "Write" And Not PatternCount ( List(FAT IO Field Value @ IO Value PI::Field mode); "Write") Or BlockTemplate @ Page item::Insight enabled Or IsEmpty ( FAT IO Value @ Page item::IO id )
SetProperty ( "Caller" ; "Page item" ) & SetProperty ( "io_id" ; FAT IO Value @ Page item::IO id )

StyledText.Data: <<ƒ:Case ( FAT IO @ Page item::Number of instances = 1; "This IO is not used anywhere else in this Title." ; FAT IO @ Page item::Number of instances > 1; "This IO is used " & FAT IO @ Page item::Number of instances & " times in this Title." ; )>>

Calculation.Text: "Show all instances of this IO in the Titlte"
IsEmpty ( FAT IO Value @ Page item::IO id )

StyledText.Data: <<ƒ:Case ( FAT IO @ Page item::Number of instances = 1; "This IO is not used anywhere else in this Title." ; FAT IO @ Page item::Number of instances > 1; "This IO is used " & FAT IO @ Page item::Number of instances & " times in this Title." ; )>>

Calculation.Text: "Show all instances of this IO in the Titlte"
"Aspect field"

ValueListReference.name: IO Fields in IO @ Page item

Calculation.Text: IsEmpty ( FAT IO Value @ Page item::IO id ) Or Not BlockTemplate @ Page item::AI aspect enabled Or FAT IO @ Page item::Number of fields = 0
FAT IO Value @ Page item::PrimaryKey
"Clear value"
IsEmpty(FAT IO Value @ Page item::IO id)
"Page item"
"Set up IOs for this page item"
Count(IO Block Template @ Page item::PrimaryKey) = 0
"Add an IO to the IO Array"
IsEmpty ( BlockTemplate @ Page item::IO Type Array)
Count(IO Block Template @ Page item::PrimaryKey)=0 And IsEmpty (BlockTemplate @ Page item::IO Type Array)
notDeveloper
"PI PrimaryKey"
Get(windowMode) ≠ 1 // Find mode
"Index"
BlockTemplate @ Page item::Insight enabled
notJens
